channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: PM To Release PM-Kisan Installment Tomorrow, Benefiting 9.5 Crore Farmers

media:content.media:description: PM Modi will release the 23rd installment of the PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi from Bengal's Hooghly on Saturday.

item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will release the 23rd installment of the PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi from Tarakeswar in West Bengal's Hooghly district on June 20, marking PM Kisan Utsav Diwas across the country.
item.content:encoded: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will release the 23rd installment of the PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi from Tarakeswar in West Bengal's Hooghly district on June 20, marking PM Kisan Utsav Diwas across the country.

item.title: "Smell The Reality": JD Vance Slams Israel For Criticising Iran Deal

media:content.media:description: JD Vance said that Israel is deeply isolated and its leaders have failed to appreciate the Iran deal.

item.description: Israel and the US jointly launched the war against Iran on Feb. 28, closely coordinating the more than month long military operation.
item.content:encoded: Israel and the US jointly launched the war against Iran on Feb. 28, closely coordinating the more than month long military operation.

item.title: US Lifts Iran Ports Blockade Ahead Of Swiss Ceremony

media:content.media:description: The US on Thursday lifted a blockade of Iranian ports imposed during the Middle East war.

item.description: The signing of the deal by Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian set in motion a 60-day period for talks on wider issues between the two foes, including the Iranian nuclear programme.
item.content:encoded: The signing of the deal by Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian set in motion a 60-day period for talks on wider issues between the two foes, including the Iranian nuclear programme.

item.title: Crippled By Delays, Pakistan's Ambitious Submarine Programme Gasps For Breath

media:content.media:description: Just one submarine, PNS Hangor, had been inducted into the Pakistan Navy.

item.description: A total of eight Hangor-class submarines were to be acquired under the deal signed by Pakistani and Chinese authorities during Chinese President Xi Jinping's visit to Islamabad in April 2015.
item.content:encoded: A total of eight Hangor-class submarines were to be acquired under the deal signed by Pakistani and Chinese authorities during Chinese President Xi Jinping's visit to Islamabad in April 2015.

item.title: Beyond Teesta: How China's River Projects Could Shape Bangladesh For Decades

media:content.media:description: The Teesta project is just a part of a much broader collaboration between Dhaka and Beijing.

item.description: The project includes major river dredging, construction of embankments, construction of reservoirs, development of an irrigation system, prevention of erosion and the development of a hydrological monitoring system.
item.content:encoded: The project includes major river dredging, construction of embankments, construction of reservoirs, development of an irrigation system, prevention of erosion and the development of a hydrological monitoring system.

item.title: Mujhe Bahut Khushi Hui: Macron's Goodbye In Hindi To PM Modi At G7

media:content.media:description: The French President also thanked PM Modi for his visit and described it as "very fruitful",

item.description: In a remarkable departure from standard diplomatic protocol, French President Emmanuel Macron gave Prime Minister Narendra Modi a warm and unusual farewell in Hindi at the end of the Indian leader's visit, drawing attention with his effort to address
item.content:encoded: In a remarkable departure from standard diplomatic protocol, French President Emmanuel Macron gave Prime Minister Narendra Modi a warm and unusual farewell in Hindi at the end of the Indian leader's visit, drawing attention with his effort to address

item.title: 'Desperate' Trump Used All Kinds Of Leverage For Iran Deal: Mojtaba Khamenei

media:content.media:description: Supreme leader acknowledged that he had personally held reservations about the agreement.

item.description: 'Desperate' Trump Used All Kinds Of Leverage To Bring About Iran Deal: Mojtaba Khamenei
item.content:encoded: 'Desperate' Trump Used All Kinds Of Leverage To Bring About Iran Deal: Mojtaba Khamenei

item.title: At Trump's Iran Deal Signing Venue, A 1919 Treaty Left This Nation Red-Faced

media:content.media:description: Versailles' role in shaping world affairs extends far beyond 1919.

item.description: The historic palace, sprawling across more than 800 hectares to the west of Paris, has long served as a backdrop for the world's most consequential negotiations.
item.content:encoded: The historic palace, sprawling across more than 800 hectares to the west of Paris, has long served as a backdrop for the world's most consequential negotiations.

item.title: Trump Tore Up Obama-Era Iran Deal. How It Compares To 2026 Memorandum

media:content.media:description: The MoU gives both sides 60 days to negotiate a final agreement, extendable by mutual consent.

item.description: On Wednesday, the US and Iran signed the Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding, a 14-point framework aimed at ending a conflict in the Middle East that had stretched to around 110 days.
item.content:encoded: On Wednesday, the US and Iran signed the Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding, a 14-point framework aimed at ending a conflict in the Middle East that had stretched to around 110 days.

item.title: Rockstar Unveils GTA 6 Cover Art, Announces Pre-Order Date

media:content.media:description: After more than a decade of waiting, the countdown to GTA VI is officially on.

item.description: Set to release on November 19, 2026, GTA 6 arrives more than 13 years after Grand Theft Auto V, the second best-selling video game of all time, and expectations could hardly be higher.
item.content:encoded: Set to release on November 19, 2026, GTA 6 arrives more than 13 years after Grand Theft Auto V, the second best-selling video game of all time, and expectations could hardly be higher.

item.title: Vietnamese Tycoon's Seized Hermes Collection Sold For Over Rs 5 Crore

media:content.media:description: During her trial, she said she wanted to keep the Birkin bags as gifts for her children

item.description: The sale included several Hermes Birkin bags, which are among the most expensive and in-demand luxury handbags in the world.
item.content:encoded: The sale included several Hermes Birkin bags, which are among the most expensive and in-demand luxury handbags in the world.

item.title: French Tanker Passes Strait Of Hormuz After War Deal: Report

media:content.media:description: Only 15 LNG carriers have left the Gulf with a cargo since the start of the conflict

item.description: A French-flagged LNG tanker left the Gulf through the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday, a tracking platform said, as an agreement to end the US-Iran war paved the way for the key passage's reopening.
item.content:encoded: A French-flagged LNG tanker left the Gulf through the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday, a tracking platform said, as an agreement to end the US-Iran war paved the way for the key passage's reopening.

item.title: Video: Ukrainian Drone Hits Russian Refinery, Blows Tank Lid Off

media:content.media:description: The blast sent the tank's circular metal lid soaring high above the facility.

item.description: According to Russian officials, Ukraine launched one of its biggest drone attacks on Moscow in more than two years.
item.content:encoded: According to Russian officials, Ukraine launched one of its biggest drone attacks on Moscow in more than two years.

item.title: Opinion: Trump's Iran War: Was It Worth It?

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump signs the Iran Memorandum of Understanding at Versailles in France

item.title: UAE Announces Social Media Ban For Children Under 15

media:content.media:description: Social media platforms will have to monitor and disable accounts created by under-15s

item.description: The United Arab Emirates announced a social media ban for children under 15 on Thursday, joining a growing group of countries including Australia, Britain and Canada to take similar measures.
item.content:encoded: The United Arab Emirates announced a social media ban for children under 15 on Thursday, joining a growing group of countries including Australia, Britain and Canada to take similar measures.

item.title: Who Was Joshua Baer, Capital Factory CEO Killed In Texas Plane Crash

media:content.media:description: In 2009, Baer founded Capital Factory in Austin, Texas.

item.description: Baer was traveling in a business jet with five other people when it crashed onto Loop 20, a major highway in Laredo and caught fire.
item.content:encoded: Baer was traveling in a business jet with five other people when it crashed onto Loop 20, a major highway in Laredo and caught fire.

item.title: Hormuz Reopening To Release Wave Of Oil Supply, Depress Prices

media:content.media:description: Reopening of Hormuz could unleash 93 million barrels of stranded non-Iranian barrels from the Gulf.

item.description: Middle Eastern crude oil markets could come under further pressure if the Strait of Hormuz reopens on Friday following
item.content:encoded: Middle Eastern crude oil markets could come under further pressure if the Strait of Hormuz reopens on Friday following

item.title: Milan Probes Tram Drivers' Chat Over CCTV Images Of Woman Passengers

media:content.media:description: Surveillance cameras are installed on public transport to protect both passengers and staff.

item.description: The case came to light in recent days after a woman travelling on a tram in Milan noticed an off-duty driver, still in uniform, sitting next to her and viewing a chat on his phone containing images focusing on parts of women's bodies filmed on public transport.
item.content:encoded: The case came to light in recent days after a woman travelling on a tram in Milan noticed an off-duty driver, still in uniform, sitting next to her and viewing a chat on his phone containing images focusing on parts of women's bodies filmed on public transport.

item.title: A History Of Iran's Nuclear Program And Tensions With US

media:content.media:description: US and Iran signed the interim deal remotely on Wednesday.

item.description: On February 28, 2026, Israel and the United States launched a war on Iran, killing Khamenei in the conflict's first moments.
item.content:encoded: On February 28, 2026, Israel and the United States launched a war on Iran, killing Khamenei in the conflict's first moments.

item.title: Indian-Origin Billionaire To Get Richer After Deal With Musk's SpaceX

media:content.media:description: Aman serves as Anysphere's Chief Operating Officer (COO).

item.description: With this buyout, each founder is expected to receive about $2.7 billion worth of SpaceX stock.
item.content:encoded: With this buyout, each founder is expected to receive about $2.7 billion worth of SpaceX stock.
